imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]]"

revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[三重県]][[南牟婁郡]][[紀宝町]]の建築物に関するカテゴリ。 {{citation needed|きほうちよう}} {{座標一覧}} ==Local Content== {{citation needed|きほうちよう}} {{座標一覧}} {{translated page|ja|Category:紀宝町の建築物|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} {{translated page|ja|Category:紀宝町の建築物|version=99962774}}
[[ja:Category:紀宝町の建築物]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Kinetsuya Shrine]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Architecture in Mie by Municipality]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Kihō]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:11]] (crud category cleanup)
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[三重県]][[南牟婁郡]][[紀宝町]]の建築物に関するカテゴリ。 {{citation needed|きほうちよう}} {{座標一覧}} ==Local Content== {{citation needed|きほうちよう}} {{座標一覧}} {{translated page|ja|Category:紀宝町の建築物|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} {{translated page|ja|Category:紀宝町の建築物|version=99962774}}
[[ja:Category:紀宝町の建築物]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Kinetsuya Shrine]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Architecture in Mie by Municipality]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Kihō]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Categories]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
